Pilot data, group averages

Lucien Bickerstaff

2026-02-03

# Seed for reproducibility
set.seed(2025)

# Libraries
library(here)
## here() starts at /Users/lbickerstaff/Documents/GitHub/BickerstaffEtAl_PCIRRStage1_2026
library(tidyverse)

source(here("R", "plot_settings.R"))

These show the group average trace data for the maxmimum light condition (8408 Mel EDI)

EMG trace

For orbicularis oculi muscle

emg_data <- read_csv(here("data", "emg_pilot_data_gavg.csv"))
## Rows: 8448 Columns: 6
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (1): participant_id
## dbl (5): channel, sample, time_sec, mean_trace, sd
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
plot_emg <- ggplot(emg_data, aes(x = time_sec, y = mean_trace, group = participant_id)) +
    geom_line(color = "black") +
    geom_rect(data = shaded_region_yellow,
              aes(xmin = xmin + delay, xmax = xmax + delay, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
              fill = "yellow", alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    geom_rect(data = shaded_region_orange,
              aes(xmin = xmin + delay, xmax = xmax + delay, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
              fill = "orange", alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", label = "Light onset") +
    geom_ribbon(aes(x = time_sec, ymin = mean_trace - sd, ymax = mean_trace + sd),
                fill = "black", alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    # Horizontal reference line at 0
    geom_hline(yintercept = 100, color = "darkred", alpha = 0.3) +
    # ylim(0, 1000) +
    xlim(-10, 55) +
    labs(title = "Facial OO-EMG",
         x = "Time (s)", y = "Activity (% of baseline)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
          strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  plot_formatting
## Warning in geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", :
## Ignoring unknown parameters: `label`
print(plot_emg)
## Warning: Removed 127 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).
## Warning: Removed 127 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_ribbon()`).

Pupil traces

pupil_data <- read_csv(here("data", "pupil_pilot_data_gavg.csv"))
## Rows: 4560 Columns: 4
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (1): participant_id
## dbl (3): sample, mean_trace, sd
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
plot_pupil <- ggplot(pupil_data, aes(x = (sample/60)-10, y = mean_trace, group = participant_id)) +
    geom_line(color = "black") +
    geom_rect(data = shaded_region_yellow,
              aes(xmin = xmin + delay, xmax = xmax + delay, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
              fill = "yellow", alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    geom_rect(data = shaded_region_orange,
              aes(xmin = xmin + delay, xmax = xmax + delay, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
              fill = "orange", alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", label = "Light onset") +
    geom_ribbon(aes(x = (sample/60)-10, ymin = mean_trace - sd, ymax = mean_trace + sd),
                fill = "black", alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    # Horizontal reference line at 0
    geom_hline(yintercept = 100, color = "darkred", alpha = 0.3) +
    # ylim(0, 1000) +
    xlim(-10, 55) +
    labs(title = "Pupillary Light Reflex (PLR)",
         x = "Time (s)", y = "Pupil size (% of baseline)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
          strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  plot_formatting
## Warning in geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", :
## Ignoring unknown parameters: `label`
print(plot_pupil)
## Warning: Removed 660 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).
## Warning: Removed 660 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_ribbon()`).

Rating data

rating_data <- read_csv(here("data", "ratings_pilot_data_gavg.csv"))
## Rows: 5 Columns: 4
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (1): participant_id
## dbl (3): melanopic_edi, mean_rating_vd, sd_rating_vd
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
plot_ratings <- ggplot(rating_data, aes(x = melanopic_edi, y = mean_rating_vd)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_rating_vd - sd_rating_vd,
                    ymax = mean_rating_vd + sd_rating_vd),
                width = 0.1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", colour = "red") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  ylim(0, 7) +
  labs(title = "Reported visual discomfort",
         x = "Melanopic EDI (lux)", y = "Mean rating (1-7)") +
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
          strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  plot_formatting
print(plot_ratings)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

plot_all <- plot_emg + plot_pupil + plot_ratings
plot_all
## Warning: Removed 127 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).
## Warning: Removed 127 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_ribbon()`).
## Warning: Removed 660 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).
## Warning: Removed 660 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_ribbon()`).
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

formatted_save(here("outputs", "figures", "pilot_data_gavg.jpg"), plot = plot_all, height = 3)
## Warning: Removed 127 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).
## Warning: Removed 127 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_ribbon()`).
## Warning: Removed 660 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).
## Warning: Removed 660 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_ribbon()`).
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
saveRDS(plot_all, here("outputs", "figures", "rds", "pilot_data_gavg.rds"))
sessionInfo()
